name: Galliano Barbecued Ribs
recipeIngredient: 3 Pounds pork back ribs, up to 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ribs into 3-bone sections.
2. Place them in a pot of boiling salted water and boil for about 20 minutes.
3. Mix all sauce ingredients together in a medium-sized bowl.
4. Preheat an oven to 350°F or heat a barbecue grill.
5. Remove the ribs from the water and place them on a baking sheet or on the grill, meat side up.
6. Baste with the BBQ sauce and bake for about 25 minutes.
7. Turn the ribs and bake again for another 25 minutes.
8. Turn the ribs again, baste, and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
